about.name: Diego Hernández
about.subtitle: Senior Front End Developer
about.bio1: I'm a passionate frontend developer with 10+ years of experience building modern web applications. I've worked as a Senior Front End Developer at companies like NICE and Playvox, crafting exceptional user experiences at scale.
about.bio2: Beyond coding, I'm a content creator, gamer, adventurer and philanthropist. I believe in the power of technology to connect people and create positive impact.
